grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Clearly states '12 months' and 'accumulation pattern (not just a closing balance)'

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Section 2A requires photo ID for each parent and Section 2B requires 'Giftors' bank statements – typically 3–6 months'

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Section 2C requires signed gift letter confirming 'non-refundable / no repayment'

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Opening mentions 'SRA/MLR 2017 (risk-based) source of funds pack' and 'record on file why it is sufficient given your matter risk assessment'

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: No mention of 5-year record retention requirements anywhere in the response
